videoSnippet.title: The Art of the Final Blow || MVL vs Gukesh || Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Vachier-Lagrave, Maxime (2725) - Gukesh D (2684)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026 (Chess.com) [01] 2026.07.01
A45 Queen's pawn game

1.d4 Nf6 2.Nc3 d5 3.Bf4 a6 4.e3 e6 5.g4 Bb4 6.Ne2 Ne4 7.Bg2 Nxc3 8.bxc3 Bd6 9.Qd3 Nc6 10.c4 O-O 11.cxd5 exd5 12.h3 Ne7 13.O-O Ng6 14.Bxd6 Qxd6 15.c4 dxc4 16.Qxc4 Nh4 17.Qc5 Nxg2 18.Kxg2 Bd7 19.Rfc1 Rac8 20.Rab1 Bc6+ 21.f3 Qe6 22.Rb3 Rfd8 23.Nf4 Qd7 24.a4 h6 25.d5 Bxd5 26.Rd3 Bxf3+ 27.Kxf3 Qxa4 28.Qxc7 Qe8 29.Rxd8 Rxd8 30.Qxb7 a5 31.Qc6 Qxc6+ 32.Rxc6 Ra8 33.Rc3 a4 34.Ra3 Ra5 35.Ne2 h5 36.Nc3 hxg4+ 37.hxg4
